info.name: Beats API
info.description: Beats API collection. Start with Auth module.

request.description: Register a new user. A verification email is sent via Resend — login is blocked until the email is verified. In dev/staging the verificationToken is returned in the response and auto-saved here for convenience.
Verify the email address using the one-time token from the verification email. On success the user is immediately logged in and tokens are auto-saved.
Re-send the verification email via Resend. Returns 200 even if the email is not found (prevents enumeration). Returns 409 if already verified. In dev/staging the new token is returned and auto-saved.
Login with email and password. Auto-saves tokens on success.

Sign in or sign up with a Google ID token (obtained client-side via Google Identity Services / the mobile Google Sign-In SDK). Set the googleIdToken variable to a real token to test. Auto-saves tokens on success.
Logout by invalidating the refresh token. Clears stored tokens on success.
Exchange a refresh token for a new access/refresh token pair (token rotation).
Request a password reset. In production a reset email is sent via Resend. In dev/test the token is returned in the response and auto-saved.
Reset password. Revokes all sessions — login again afterwards.
Change password for the authenticated user. Revokes every other session and issues a fresh token pair (auto-saved) so this device stays signed in.
Get the authenticated user's profile.
Update profile fields. At least one field is required.

formdata.description: JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF — max 5 MB

request.description: Upload a profile avatar via multipart/form-data. Field name must be "avatar". Returns updated profile with new avatar URL.

query.description: newest | oldest | priceAsc | priceDesc | bpmAsc | bpmDesc

request.description: Paginated list of all published beats.
Single beat detail by numeric ID.

query.description: newest | oldest | priceAsc | priceDesc | bpmAsc | bpmDesc

request.description: Full-text search across beat title, description, and tags. At least one of q, bpm, or tag is required.
Filter beats by category, sub-category, price range, or free flag.
Beats marked as featured.
Beats available for free.

formdata.description: Audio file (MP3, WAV, FLAC, AAC) — max 100 MB. Required.
Cover image (JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF) — max 5 MB. Optional.

request.description: Upload a new beat as multipart/form-data. beatFile (audio) is required. Requires PRODUCER or ADMIN role.

formdata.description: Audio file (MP3, WAV, FLAC, AAC) — max 100 MB. Omit to keep existing.
Cover image (JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF) — max 5 MB. Omit to keep existing.

request.description: Update a beat by ID as multipart/form-data. Files are optional — omit to keep existing. Requires PRODUCER or ADMIN role.
Delete a beat by ID. Requires PRODUCER or ADMIN role.
All genres/categories ordered by name.
Paginated beats for a specific category identified by its slug.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Hip Hop",
  "title": "Buy Hip Hop Beats & Tracks | Premium Rap Instrumentals",
  "description": "Exclusive Hip Hop beats, trap instrumentals, and rap tracks.",
  "regularBuyerFee": 29,
  "extendedBuyerFee": 100,
  "fileType": true,
  "thumbnailWidth": 512,
  "thumbnailHeight": 512,
  "previewImageWidth": 1080,
  "previewImageHeight": 1080,
  "mainFileTypes": "zip,rar,mp3,wav,mp4",
  "maxPreviewFileSize": 524288000,
  "sortId": 2
}

request.description: ADMIN only. Creates a category. slug is auto-generated from name when omitted. Saves {{categoryId}}.
ADMIN only. Full category detail including fees and media dimensions.
ADMIN only. Send only the fields to change (at least one).
ADMIN only. Returns 409 if the category still has beats or sub-categories.
Get the authenticated user's cart with beat details.
Add a beat to the cart. licenseType: regular | extended.
Remove a cart item by its numeric ID.

STEP 1 — Validate the selected cart items and create a pending transaction priced in the chosen display currency (USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, CNY, or NGN). Payment always settles in NGN. Saves the returned id to {{checkoutId}}.

STEP 2 — Items, subtotal, and totals in the selected display currency. Each gateway shows its fee/total in the display currency plus chargeTotal (the actual NGN amount it will charge). All gateways are available for every currency.

STEP 3 — Recomputes amount/fee/total server-side, persists the gateway + billing snapshot, and returns the hosted paymentUrl. Saves {{paymentReference}}. Open paymentUrl in a browser to complete payment on the gateway sandbox.

STEP 4 — What the Flutter app polls after sending the buyer to the gateway. Returns the verified payment status (pending | paid | failed | cancelled) confirmed server-side by the webhook. If still pending it re-verifies with the gateway idempotently, so the client never gets stuck. Redirect/callback URLs play no part in confirmation.

Reference only. The signature header must be a valid HMAC-SHA512 of the exact raw body using your Paystack secret key, so this only succeeds when delivered by Paystack (or a correctly-signed test). Returns 401 on a bad signature.
Producer earnings per sale with total amount in meta. Requires PRODUCER or ADMIN role.
Paginated list of individual beat sales for the producer. Requires PRODUCER or ADMIN role.
Get a pre-signed S3 download URL for a purchased beat. The `id` is the purchase ID (purchases.id), not the beat ID. URL is valid for 1 hour.
List the authenticated user's playlists with full item details ordered by position.
Create a new playlist.
Add a published beat to a playlist. Returns 409 if beat is already in the playlist.
Remove a beat from a playlist by playlist ID and beat ID.
List the authenticated user's favorited beats. Each item is a full beat with a `favoritedAt` timestamp. Newest first.
Add a published beat to favorites. Returns 409 if the beat is already favorited.
Remove a beat from favorites by beat ID. Returns 404 if not in favorites.

List all completed purchases for the authenticated user, newest first. Use `data[].id` (purchase ID) with `GET /downloads/{id}` to get a signed download URL. Auto-saves the first result to {{purchaseId}}.
Get a single purchase record by ID. Returns 404 if the purchase does not belong to the authenticated user.
Paginated purchase history for the authenticated user.
Pre-checkout validation. Checks beats are published, purchasable, and not already owned. Returns { ok, issues }.
Get a single order (transaction) by its numeric ID.
